title: TestCaseIncidentGroup
description: Aggregated count of open test case incidents for a given grouping dimension.

incidentGroupBy.description: Dimension used to group test case incidents.

incidentTrendDirection.description: Direction of the group's incident-creation trend, comparing the second half of the `trend` buckets against the first half.

groupBy.description: Dimension the incidents are grouped by.

id.description: Unique identifier of the entity the group represents.

name.description: Name of the entity the group represents.

displayName.description: Display name of the entity the group represents.

fullyQualifiedName.description: Fully qualified name of the entity the group represents.

incidentCount.description: Number of distinct open incidents in the group.

severity.description: Most critical severity across the group's open incidents (Severity1 is the most critical). Absent when no incident in the group has a severity.

status.description: Most actionable current status across the group's open incidents, in the order Assigned > Ack > New.

assignees.description: Distinct names of the current assignees of the group's open incidents.

assigneeCount.description: Number of distinct current assignees across the group's open incidents.

firstSeen.description: Timestamp at which the earliest open incident in the group was opened.

lastSeen.description: Timestamp of the most recent status change across the group's open incidents.

trend.description: Number of incidents opened in each of 8 equal time buckets spanning `firstSeen` to `lastSeen`.

trendDirection.description: Direction of the incident-creation trend for the group.
